comment: Machine-readable refresh status — written by the nightly agent EVERY run, enforced by src/check-refresh.mjs against data/required-sources.json. This seed row-set reconstructs the 2026-07-12 run (the last before manifest enforcement) from its commit message and the stored snapshot/asOf dates; results marked skipped/partial here are exactly the quiet drift the external audit flagged.
